content.situation: 在项目会议上，经理总结了你的任务，你需要确认理解无误并承诺完成。
content.speakerText: So to confirm, you'll finalize the presentation slides, update the data charts, and send the final version to the team by EOD?
content.speakerTextCn: 确认一下：你会完成演示文稿、更新数据图表，并在今天下班前发给团队，对吗？
content.responseTemplate: Yes, ___ I'll also add a brief summary on the last slide for clarity.
content.hint: 用肯定语气复述对方确认的内容，表达明确同意

content.situation: 同事向你确认任务分工，你需要明确表示理解并补充一个额外动作。
content.speakerText: Alright, so you're handling the client feedback summary and I'll take care of the proposal draft?
content.speakerTextCn: 好的，所以你负责客户反馈总结，我来处理提案草稿，对吗？
content.responseTemplate: Exactly, ___ I'll also organize the supporting documents in a shared folder.
content.hint: 在确认后补充额外动作，使用衔接词自然过渡
content.knowledgePoint: 确认后补充动作的表达结构

content.situation: 你和导师核对论文修改任务，对方说完后你需简短确认并承诺执行。
content.speakerText: So you'll rewrite the methodology section, clarify the research questions, and resubmit by Tuesday?
content.speakerTextCn: 所以你要重写方法论部分、澄清研究问题，并在周二前重新提交，对吗？
content.responseTemplate: ___ I'll make sure everything's polished before sending it over.
content.hint: 用口语化但清晰的表达确认理解，并展现主动性
